title: COLLATE nocase index on a WITHOUT ROWID table malfunctions
poc: CREATE TABLE test (c1 TEXT PRIMARY KEY) WITHOUT ROWID;
CREATE INDEX index_0 ON test(c1 COLLATE NOCASE);
key_bug_features: COLLATE NOCASE index on WITHOUT ROWID table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2 (c1 TEXT PRIMARY KEY, c2 INTEGER NOT NULL) WITHOUT ROWID;
CREATE INDEX index_1 ON test2(c1 COLLATE NOCASE);
